message:
feat: Implement real GC cycle detection, process time, and locale handling

- gc.zig: Implement proper trial deletion cycle detection algorithm
  - Phase 1: Copy reference counts, mark as collecting
  - Phase 2: Trial deletion (subtract internal references)
  - Phase 3: Move unreachable objects (gc_refs == 0)
  - Phase 4-6: Finalization and cleanup
  - Update statistics correctly

- pytime.zig: Use real CLOCK_PROCESS_CPUTIME_ID and CLOCK_THREAD_CPUTIME_ID
  - Linux/BSD: Use clock_gettime with proper clock IDs
  - macOS/Windows: Fall back to monotonic time with documentation

- pylifecycle.zig: Implement proper thread shutdown and locale detection
  - waitForThreadShutdown: Actually wait for threads using threading.activeCount()
  - coerceLegacyLocale: Check LC_CTYPE, LC_ALL, LANG environment variables
  - isLegacyLocaleDetected: Properly detect C/POSIX legacy locales

- shutil.zig: Implement copy2 with real metadata preservation
  - Copy modification time (atime, mtime) using updateTimes
  - Preserve file permissions on POSIX systems using chmod
